text_raw: Out with it, tell the truth. Where did your little brother run off to?
text_clean: Out with it, tell the truth. Where did your little brother run off to?

text_raw: Here we go! One! Two! Three!
text_clean: Here we go! One! Two! Three!

text_raw: Hurry up and check his pocket.
text_clean: Hurry up and check his pocket.

text_raw: S-spare me, I beg of you!!
text_clean: S-spare me, I beg of you!!

text_raw: Th-thank you... Thank you so much...
text_clean: Th-thank you... Thank you so much...

text_raw: If you've neither coin nor land, you'd best work yourself to the bone.
text_clean: If you've neither coin nor land, you'd best work yourself to the bone.

text_raw: ... Damn it. Pailune is full of lazy bastards.
text_clean: ... Damn it. Pailune is full of lazy bastards.

text_raw: No wonder they cozy up to Greymanes.
text_clean: No wonder they cozy up to Greymanes.

text_raw: Hey...! Can't you spare me just a little?
text_clean: Hey...! Can't you spare me just a little?

text_raw: You! This time, fight properly, okay?
text_clean: You! This time, fight properly, okay?

text_raw: Then slit his throat and be done with it.
text_clean: Then slit his throat and be done with it.

text_raw: If you want your brats to live, you'd best do as I say.
text_clean: If you want your brats to live, you'd best do as I say.

text_raw: Aren't you sick of watching this yet?
text_clean: Aren't you sick of watching this yet?

text_raw: Let's drag in some women next time.
text_clean: Let's drag in some women next time.

text_raw: Not a single decent soul in this wretched village?
text_clean: Not a single decent soul in this wretched village?

text_raw: Didn't I tell you not to get clever?!
text_clean: Didn't I tell you not to get clever?!

text_raw: Thanks to you, we caught and beat the rat.
text_clean: Thanks to you, we caught and beat the rat.

text_raw: Good work. Now get out of here.
text_clean: Good work. Now get out of here.

text_raw: Save your anger for the afterlife!
text_clean: Save your anger for the afterlife!

text_raw: It... it was them! They did it!
text_clean: It... it was them! They did it!
